creator: ben@lavery-griffiths.com
text:
Created attachment 172362
dmesg

Two panics this evening:

1st - While using fetch(1) to download Hugo source (https://github.com/spf13/hugo/archive/v0.16.tar.gz).  Also inadvertently downloaded the same file through Firefox while fetching.

2nd - While trying to scp(1) the tarball of the crash dumps to my VPS, I noticed the that the transfer had stalled, then the second panic.

Environment:
ZSH
Terminator
Xfce

Both were over WiFi and both were over the Internet.  Just transferred (via scp) the dumps to another computer on my LAN over the WiFi without an issue…

Dumps:
https://manaha.co.uk/dumps/panic_20160710_2204.tar.bz2
https://manaha.co.uk/dumps/panic_20160710_2239.tar.bz2
